records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, Bora. What's up?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, Bora. What's up?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, Bora. What's up?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going overseas... for work?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going overseas... for work?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going overseas... for work?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I was just about to board the plane.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I was just about to board the plane.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I was just about to board the plane.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to get back to my work, dontcha think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to get back to my work, dontcha think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to get back to my work, dontcha think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, and I was gonna tell ya later, but I had fun in Counters Legacy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, and I was gonna tell ya later, but I had fun in Counters Legacy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, and I was gonna tell ya later, but I had fun in Counters Legacy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah! Our memories are kept alive thanks to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah! Our memories are kept alive thanks to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah! Our memories are kept alive thanks to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Rinae.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Rinae.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Rinae.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need... a favor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need... a favor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need... a favor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? What is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? What is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? What is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, these monsters are strong!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, these monsters are strong!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, these monsters are strong!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course they are. Only someone as skilled as I can even dare to enter this dungeon.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course they are. Only someone as skilled as I can even dare to enter this dungeon.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... Thanks for helping us, but I don't think you're the hero we're looking for.
